[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0111001010 5
1 0010110110 5
2 1011111101 8
3 0000010000 1
4 1110001100 5
5 0000000000 a
6 1000001001 3
7 1001100101 5
